# apk-signer

Easy signing with apk-signer

## Installation

{{ PyPI-Downloads }}

```sh
pip install apk-signer
```

## Prerequirement

Download: 

[Android SDK](https://developer.android.com/studio/releases/platform-tools?hl=ko)

## Usage

```sh
$ apk-signer {APK_PATH}
```
